patterns.message: Warning: Freezing level rising (1889 → 1985 → 2110m). Rain risk at freeride elevations.
Cold snap Day 9: 6°C drop to -6°C. Great for powder preservation.
Close to cold snap Day 10: 5°C drop to -10°C (needs >5°C drop below -5°C).
